title: rubus hirtus var. pendulinus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. pendulinus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a variant of the raspberry plant that is native to the Himalayan regions. It is a deciduous shrub with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. pendulinus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications for medicinal purposes.
